description: Default capability — the explicit allow-list of Tauri commands the Pangolin desktop shell exposes to its frontend. Mirrors apps/desktop/src/lib.rs's invoke_handler registry; principle-of-least-authority per the MVP-4-B plan §3.5 (L4). Audit MEDIUM M-2 hardening (2026-05-25): the prior `core:default` umbrella transitively included `core:event:default`, which is NOT part of the minimum first surface. Replaced with the minimal explicit subset: `core:app:default` (app metadata + version) + `core:window:default` (the managed window). No `core:event:*`, no `core:webview:*`, no `core:tray:*` — they expand later sub-issues' scope, not this slice's.
